HERMITMOD-OLD_LOCKET.title: Old Locket
HERMITMOD-OLD_LOCKET.description: At the start of each combat, add a [gold]Memento[/gold] into your hand.
HERMITMOD-RYE_STALK.title: Rye Stalk
HERMITMOD-RYE_STALK.flavor: Still in mint condition, despite being chewed on for so long.
HERMITMOD-RYE_STALK.description: Whenever you lose HP during enemy turn, draw [blue]1[/blue] card.
HERMITMOD-SHOTGLASS.title: Shotglass
HERMITMOD-SHOTGLASS.flavor: Any liquid placed inside changes into something else.
HERMITMOD-SHOTGLASS.description: First [blue]{Limit}[/blue] times you use a potion each combat, gain a random potion. You can only use [blue]{Limit}[/blue] potions each combat.
HERMITMOD-HORSESHOE.title: Horseshoe
HERMITMOD-HORSESHOE.flavor: Lucky charm. Somebody is gonna be missing this.
HERMITMOD-HORSESHOE.description: Whenever you gain [gold]Weak[/gold], [gold]Frail[/gold] or [gold]Vulnerable[/gold], gain [blue]1[/blue] less.
HERMITMOD-SPYGLASS.title: Spyglass
HERMITMOD-SPYGLASS.description: If you end your turn [gold]Concentrated[/gold], gain an additional {Energy:energyIcons()} next turn.
HERMITMOD-RED_SCARF.title: Red Scarf
HERMITMOD-RED_SCARF.description: Whenever you apply a new debuff to an enemy, gain [blue]{Block}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
HERMITMOD-DENTED_PLATE.title: Dented Plate
HERMITMOD-DENTED_PLATE.flavor: Several bullets are still lodged inside.
HERMITMOD-DENTED_PLATE.description: While your HP is at or below [blue]50%[/blue], gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw [blue]1[/blue] card at the start of your turn.
HERMITMOD-PET_GHOST.title: Pet Ghost
HERMITMOD-PET_GHOST.description: Prevent your first lethal HP loss each combat.
HERMITMOD-CHARRED_GLOVE.title: Charred Glove
HERMITMOD-CHARRED_GLOVE.flavor: Parts of the glove still glow with otherworldly cinders.
HERMITMOD-CLASPED_LOCKET.title: Clasped Locket
HERMITMOD-CLASPED_LOCKET.description: Replaces [gold]Old Locket[/gold]. First time you draw a curse each turn, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] it and draw {Cards} cards. Upon pickup, obtain {Curses} [gold]Injuries[/gold].
HERMITMOD-STRAIGHT_RAZOR.title: Straight Razor
HERMITMOD-STRAIGHT_RAZOR.description: Whenever you remove or [gold]Transform[/gold] a card from your deck, heal [blue]{Heal}[/blue] HP.
HERMITMOD-BRASS_TACKS.title: Brass Tacks
HERMITMOD-BRASS_TACKS.flavor: The luster on these tacks never seems to fade.
HERMITMOD-BRASS_TACKS.description: At the end of your turn, gain [blue]{Block}[/blue] Block.
HERMITMOD-BLACK_POWDER.title: Black Powder
HERMITMOD-BLACK_POWDER.description: Whenever you trigger a [gold]Dead On[/gold] effect, deal [blue]{Damage}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
HERMITMOD-BROKEN_TOOTH.title: Broken Tooth
HERMITMOD-BROKEN_TOOTH.flavor: Appears too large to have come from a human jaw...
HERMITMOD-BROKEN_TOOTH.description: Whenever you defeat an Elite encounter, heal [blue]{Heal}[/blue] HP and gain [blue]{Gold}[/blue] gold.
